SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.project

Class JkProjectTesting

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.project.JkProjectTesting
public class JkProjectTesting extends Object
Handles project testing step. This involves both test compilation and run. Users can configure inner phases by chaining runnables. They also can modify JkJavaCompilerToolChain, JkJavaCompileSpec for test compilation and JkTestProcessor, JkTestSelection for test run.

    Performs entire test phase, including : compile regular code if needed perform pre test tasks if present compile test code and process test resources execute compiled tests execute post tesks if present

    As #run, but performs only if not already done.

  • Field Details

    • compilation

      public final JkProjectCompilation compilation

    • testProcessor

      @Deprecated public final JkTestProcessor testProcessor
      Deprecated.
      Use processor instead

    • processor

      public final JkTestProcessor processor
      The processor running the tests.

      Tests to be run.

      @Deprecated public final JkTestSelection testSelection
      Deprecated.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public JkProjectTesting apply(Consumer<JkProjectTesting> consumer)
      Applies the given consumer to the current instance of JkProjectTesting. This method allows you to modify the JkProjectTesting object using the provided consumer.

    • getTestClasspath

      public JkPathSequence getTestClasspath()
      Returns the classpath to run the test. It consists in test classes + prod classes + dependencies defined in testing/compile.

    • isSkipped

      public boolean isSkipped()
      Returns if the tests should be skipped.

    • setSkipped

      public JkProjectTesting setSkipped(boolean skipped)
      Specifies if the tests should be skipped.

    • isBreakOnFailures

      public boolean isBreakOnFailures()
      Returns if #run should fail (throwing a IllegalArgumentException) if test result has failures.

    • setBreakOnFailures

      public JkProjectTesting setBreakOnFailures(boolean breakOnFailures)
      Sets whether the execution of tests should break (throw an IllegalArgumentException) if there are test failures.

    • getReportDir

      public Path getReportDir()
      Returns the directory path where the test reports are stored.

    • setReportDir

      public JkProjectTesting setReportDir(String reportDir)
      Sets the directory path where the test reports are stored.

    • run

      public void run()
      Performs entire test phase, including :
      • compile regular code if needed
      • perform pre test tasks if present
      • compile test code and process test resources
      • execute compiled tests
      • execute post tesks if present

    • runIfNeeded

      public void runIfNeeded()
      As #run, but performs only if not already done.

    • createDefaultProcessor

      public JkTestProcessor createDefaultProcessor()
      Creates a default test processor for running tests.
      Returns:
      a default JkTestProcessor object.
